name_en: Top-tier replica, changed code chip, top-grain cowhide
name_cn:
Top-tier replica, changed code chip, top-grain cowhide
M59953 Caramel Brown M20520 White M59950 Blue M59954 Black
The Marelle Tote Medium Handbag features Epi grained leather to outline fluid lines, continuing iconic elements such as a detachable Monogram pocket, hollowed-out LV logo, and Toron handles, providing a flexible choice for urban life. The detachable shoulder strap frees your hands for easy crossbody wear.
Size: 30.0 x 21.0 x 13.0 cm (L x H x W)
